assets.caption: Review mode showing file list, stats, and unified diff
Review mode showing the binary file fallback

scenario.title: Diff view in review mode
steps: Click a PR awaiting review item
Verify the diff file list appears with file entries and stats
Verify the selected file shows unified diff with add/remove coloring
Verify binary files show a label instead of diff content
Press Escape and verify review mode closes

assertions.description: A PR awaiting review item is visible in the inbox
Clicking a PR item opens review mode with diff viewer
The diff file list is visible with file entries
File stats (additions/deletions) are visible in the file list
Selecting a file shows its unified diff with line coloring
Binary file shows a label instead of diff content
Pressing Escape closes review mode and returns to inbox

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence
### Diff view in review mode

![Review mode showing file list, stats, and unified diff](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/4cecd344234a7045bd087fc6deef6b3989d6ec45/openspec/changes/gh-153-diff-view-review-mode/evidence/01-unified-diff.webp)
![Review mode showing the binary file fallback](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/4cecd344234a7045bd087fc6deef6b3989d6ec45/openspec/changes/gh-153-diff-view-review-mode/evidence/02-binary-file.webp)

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. Navigate to the inbox view
2. Click a PR awaiting review item
3. Verify the diff file list appears with file entries and stats
4. Verify file stats (additions/deletions) are visible
5. Verify the selected file shows unified diff with add/remove coloring
6. Verify binary files show a label instead of diff content
7. Press Escape and verify review mode closes

</details>
